description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets GOPATH to the current directory in a before_script. Define stages build and test. Add a go-build-1.4 job in the build stage using the golang:1.4 image that runs git submodule update --init, go get github.com/stretchr/testify, and go build. Add a go-build-1.5 job in the build stage using the golang:1.5 image that runs git submodule update --init, go get github.com/stretchr/testify, and go build. Add a go-test-1.4 job in the test stage using the golang:1.4 image that runs go get github.com/stretchr/testify and go test. Add a go-test-1.5 job in the test stage using the golang:1.5 image that runs go get github.com/stretchr/testify and go test. Add a vet job in the build stage using the golang:1.5 image that runs a for loop over all *.go files executing go tool vet -composites=false -unusedresult=false $f.
